name: ml-feature-evaluator
description: Structured go/no-go evaluation for adding a new feature or data source to a production ML model. Runs a 12-step diagnostic (data quality, distribution, outcome gradient, bucket decomposition, coverage gaps, entropy with gain ratio, conditional MI, incremental CV AUC, SHAP interaction detection, permutation importance with CV), 9-point temporal safety checklist, concept drift monitoring, and produces a decision-backed implementation plan with monitoring spec.
